steps.title: Spot the time signal
steps.content: Both Sierra Leone and West Africa experienced urbanization during the same five-year interval (2015–2020, referenced as “that five-year period”). The transition word must express simultaneity.

steps.title: Match the simultaneity
steps.content: ”Concurrently” means “at the same time,” capturing the parallel timing of the two urbanization trends. “For example,” “In other words,” and “Eventually” convey different relationships—illustration, restatement, and forward-in-time—that don't fit a simultaneous scenario. That matches choice A — A is correct.
